notes: Mexico entered the last-16 clash with no injury concerns whatsoever after their 2-0 win over Ecuador, with all players fit including teenage playmaker Gilberto Mora. England were severely depleted at right-back: Reece James (hamstring) was ruled out for the last two matches, Jarell Quansah (ankle) returned but was a late fitness doubt, and Djed Spence picked up a new training injury the day before the game, forcing Tuchel into a makeshift solution; Declan Rice also managed nerve back pain…
home_scorers: Raul Jimenez (leading striker, set-piece and penalty threat)
Julian Quinones (tournament top scorer, electric wide forward)
away_scorers: Harry Kane (captain, penalty taker, tournament top scorer)
Jude Bellingham (creative talisman, goals and assists)
Bukayo Saka (starting winger, direct goal threat)
